data: UNVEIL® is a creative studio using technology to expand human creativity.
For Balenciaga’s Summer 26 collection, UNVEIL® created a series of short videos for social media, set in calm, slightly altered everyday scenes.
For Salomon’s new global campaign, UNVEIL® created a 45s film where a character moves through shifting worlds, blending nature, technology, and imagination.
Graphic identity for COHL, a next-generation company building creative infrastructures for generative AI.
A series of images centered on unstable identity, where the self divides and transforms. The images act as mental states, leaving meaning open.
For DRIFT x Schott NYC, UNVEIL® created a series of images exploring everyday surrealism.
UNVEIL® translates 444's two-day, 240 km run across Italy into a visual study of exhaustion, hallucination, and forward motion.
Bespoke advertising for Dries Van Noten Beauty @driesvannoten in Beauty Papers, The Hollywood Issue.
For 'Cherry Blue' music video, UNVEIL® used AI to bring Pol Taburet’s drawings to life and shape the film’s rhythm.
Bespoke advertising for Byredo in Beauty Papers, The Hollywood Issue.
For AW25, Heliot Emil’s Eigengrau dives into dreams and the shared unconscious. UNVEIL® shaped it through three AI films and stills, each a distinct dream.
Not the Day, Nor the Hour
A short film made entirely with AI in under 48 hours, offering an intimate, personal reading of the prophetic signs said to announce Judgment Day.
To accompany DRIFT’s debut album, UNVEIL® created 500 AI-generated images exploring a surreal, dreamlike reality “adrift”.
Music video for At The Party, the lead single from DRIFT, exploring desire, loneliness, and the blur between a chaotic night and an uncanny feeling.
AI Campaign for the new line of products of Anthony Calydon. A botanical reinterpretation of the Denim Bag, combining couture precision and organical elements.
For chapter two of Puma x Heliot Emil, UNVEIL® captures runner’s high through surreal, impossible motion, paired with AI-made BTS that blurs fact and fiction.
For the launch of the Neo robot by 1X, UNVEIL® reimagines it through AI-generated content, exploring its dystopian potential as a domestic companion.
Visuals created for the music video 'Mona Lisa' by Elias Rønnenfelt.
AI campaign for the new Square Collection of LCD, the jewelry brand founded by Lorette Colé Duprat. A story of lasting love across generations.
An in-house study of quiet tension between human stillness and natural power, with painterly images where identity and nature slowly merge.
A visual exploration of familiar strangeness for Runway. Created with Runway Frames.
An ongoing series using Midjourney’s hidden cursed model. Beauty in corrupted imagery. Not recommended for loved ones.
AI visualizer for the Cirrus by NTO.
AI visualizer for Stratus by NTO.
Images generated for the second volume of Spells, a publication dedicated to documenting the practice of pure textual prompting.
In this in-house art project, we explored the concept of what an AI's memories might looks like.
So Much for A Piece of Blue Sky
Coffee, running, metro, small actions hint at something deeper. What does that blue sky mean to each of us?
For Nova Carbon, whose mission is to democratize the use of carbon fiber by developing high-performance products from carbon fiber waste...
For ARTXCODE, a generative art house founded by Sofia Garcia, UNVEIL® crafted a distinct graphic identity and designed its digital platform.
'Ellie', the grand-prize winner of the Gen:48 video competition hosted by Runway, is a short film produced in 48 hours.
A polymorphic identity and website for MINIMAXXX, built from shifting logos tied to each pop-up location, with tactile, hand-layered scanning methods.
A full year of MINIMAXXX posters mixing minimal and dense compositions, evolving logos, type experiments and AI textures within one adaptable identity system.
For Orenji, renowned for its floral-flavored sake, UNVEIL® managed the artistic direction and produced the campaign visuals.
Axis Mundi, UNVEIL®'s largest in-house project, is a gamified artistic experience that merges cinema and video games.

UNVEIL® sees serendipity as an integral part of its creative process. Rather than resisting the randomness and chaos of AI, the studio leans into it, following its rabbit holes and exploring the unexpected. UNVEIL® is actively seeking out accidents, those magical, imperfect moments that elevate and sublimate its productions.
UNVEIL® sees serendipity as an integral part of its creative process.
